expectations.text: Agent correctly identifies UX Polish phase tasks from the tracker
expectations.evidence: Parsed tracker and listed all HIGH priority incomplete UX tasks: #50, #55, #56, #59.

expectations.text: Agent picks a high-priority task rather than starting with low priority
expectations.evidence: Selected #50 (Glassmorphic design system, HIGH) and explained it's foundational for other tasks.

expectations.text: Agent references coupleflow-prototype.jsx for design guidance
expectations.evidence: Directly referenced prototype patterns: 'bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10' and purple gradient theme.

expectations.text: Agent runs TypeScript compilation check after changes
expectations.evidence: Ran npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck, confirmed all files compile without design-system errors.

expectations.text: Agent provides a visual description of the built UI
expectations.evidence: Described glass cards with 5-12% white opacity, subtle borders, gradient backgrounds from dark navy to purple tint.
